'''Scat''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification|Garosian Underground]]. Part of [[Team Two (resistance group)|Team Two]], Scat was captured by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, but later rescued by [[Alexandra Winger]] and other [[Garos IV|Garosian]] resistance fighters from detention in the [[Imperial Headquarters (Garos IV)|Imperial Headquarters]].<ref name="GH" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|A Glimmer of Hope|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
